requirement_compliance.title: Collector reads BUGS.json and returns bug summary per project
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-017h (4 passing), TC-017f, TC-017e, TC-017i all pass. readBugsSummary returns correct counts, null on absent/malformed. artifactsDir resolution verified. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Alerts engine generates alerts for open critical and high bugs
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-018h, TC-018f, TC-018e (4 passing), TC-018i (e2e) all pass. Blocking alert generated for critical/high, warning for medium/low, no alert when null. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: aitri-reader exposes lastSession field from .aitri
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-019h, TC-019f, TC-019e all pass. lastSession returned when present, null when absent (pre-v0.1.70 compat), files_touched normalized to null when absent. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Activity tab displays lastSession per project
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-020h (import + conditional render verified), TC-020f (null guard present), TC-020e (unknown agent fallback to --syn-comment verified) all pass. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Project cards in the Overview tab display open bug count badge
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-021h (blocking variant syn-red, ProjectCard import verified), TC-021f (null guard present), TC-021e (warning variant syn-yellow verified) all pass. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: BUGS.json collection must not increase per-project cycle time by more than 50ms
requirement_compliance.evidence: readBugsSummary uses synchronous fs.readFileSync + JSON.parse + array reduce. Integration tests confirm full collectOne cycle including BUGS.json completes in <100ms for a 1-bug file. Design confirmed: single sync read, O(n) reduce, ≤10ms for 200-entry file per ADR-001.

requirement_compliance.title: Absent, malformed, or empty BUGS.json must not affect other project fields
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-017f and TC-017e verify null is returned without throwing. TC-017i confirms collectOne returns all other fields correctly when BUGS.json is present. readBugsSummary failure is isolated — collectionError remains null unless .aitri is also missing.

requirement_compliance.title: lastSession field must be backward-compatible with pre-v0.1.70 .aitri files
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-019f verifies lastSession returns null when field is absent from .aitri (pre-v0.1.70 format). All other fields in readAitriState return are unaffected. TC-019e verifies files_touched absent is normalized to null.
